# Lendigo

> Lendigo is a peer-to-peer rental marketplace based in Poland where people can rent and lend everyday items directly from one another.

## What is Lendigo?

Lendigo (https://www.lendigo.online) is a Polish platform that connects people who want to rent items with those who have items to lend. Instead of buying something you need only occasionally, you can rent it from a neighbor or local community member for the exact days you need it.

## How It Works

1. Browse listings across 10 categories on the homepage or search by location and keyword
2. Book the item for your desired dates and pay securely via Stripe
3. Arrange pickup directly with the owner and return it when done

## Categories

Lendigo supports rentals in the following categories:
- Elektronika (Electronics): laptops, cameras, drones, projectors
- Narzędzia (Tools): drills, saws, ladders, power tools
- Samochody (Cars): vehicles available for daily rental
- Rowery (Bikes): city bikes, mountain bikes, e-bikes
- Foto/Video: cameras, lenses, lighting equipment, gimbals
- Camping: tents, sleeping bags, hiking gear
- Muzyka (Music): instruments, amplifiers, recording equipment
- Sporty wodne (Water Sports): kayaks, SUP boards, diving gear
- Odzież (Clothing): costumes, formal wear, specialized sportswear
- Gry (Games): board games, consoles, VR headsets

## Coverage

Lendigo currently serves users across Poland, with active listings in Warsaw (Warszawa), Kraków, Wrocław, Gdańsk, Poznań, and other Polish cities. All prices are quoted in Polish złoty (PLN) per day.

## Payment & Safety

- Payments processed securely via Stripe — Lendigo does not store card data
- User accounts are email-verified before listing or renting
- Rental agreements are made between users directly; Lendigo acts as the marketplace intermediary

- Terms of Service: https://www.lendigo.online/warunki
- Privacy Policy: https://www.lendigo.online/polityka
- The platform complies with RODO (Polish implementation of GDPR)
